verdict_reason: The engineering layer is most careful in this verse precisely because the metaphysical claim is sharpest. The source pack records the four-tradition reading of padam anāmayam: Shankara names it 'the supreme state of Viṣṇu, called Liberation' (theistic-Advaita); Ramanuja names it 'devotional liberation as eternal service to the Supreme' (Vishishtadvaita); Prabhupada explicitly glosses as 'going back to Godhead' (Gaudiya Vaishnava); Mukundananda renders the lexical floor without sectarian commitment. The engineering body does NOT claim the engineer achieves any of these states. It explicitly says: 'The verse's literal claim is metaphysical and we are not making it.' This is the cleanest doctrinal handling of a metaphysically loaded verse the project requires. The STRETCHED tag and MEDIUM confidence are correctly calibrated. Pass.
